hero.title_1: Practicing math that feels like a
hero.subtitle: The most engaging way to master multiplication tables. Designed for modern teachers who want to correct less and inspire more.

features.f1_desc: Ultra-short practice phases that fit perfectly into any lesson plan. Focus stays high, cognitive load is managed, and frustration stays out.
features.f2_desc: Moving away from pure rote memorization. Interactive dot arrays help students intuitively grasp the geometric logic behind multiplication.
features.f3_desc: A transparent 10x10 progression matrix. Automatically performs formative assessment so you instantly see which problems are mastered.
features.f4_desc: Dynamically matches problem difficulty to the student's speed and accuracy in real-time. Perfectly tailored challenges inside their Zone of Proximal Development.
features.f5_desc: Students return to class with stronger fundamentals. Friendly reminders encourage children to build independent daily practice routines, so you spend less time motivating and more time teaching.
features.f6_desc: No PII collection. No student accounts. We use anonymous device-bound sessions to track mastery, guaranteeing absolute compliance with school privacy protocols.

cta.subtitle: Try it out. It takes exactly 1 minute to set up your first class on the web. Or download the app directly to individual student tablets.

legal.impressum_responsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
legal.impressum_disclaimer: This website serves as a landing page for the educational app "Better 1UP".
legal.privacy_intro: Protecting children and all users is our top priority at "Better 1UP". This privacy policy informs you about data processing in the app and on this landing page.
legal.p1_title: 1. Principle: No Data Collection from Students
legal.p1_desc: We designed Better 1UP explicitly so that absolutely no personally identifiable information (PII) is collected from children.
legal.p1_li1: No student accounts are created or required.
legal.p1_li2: No names, device IDs, email addresses, or location data of children are requested or stored.
legal.p1_li3: Learning progress in the app is processed exclusively via an anonymous, device-bound session.
legal.p2_desc: Teachers also do not need a traditional account. The classroom recovery key is generated securely and stored locally on the device, so no email address is required.
legal.p3_desc: Better 1UP is an educational product for classrooms. We guarantee:
legal.p3_li1: No third-party tracking: We do not use external analytics services. Anonymous gameplay telemetry (response times, correctness rates) is processed on our SpaceTimeDB game server and evaluated via Hugging Face infrastructure to power adaptive difficulty. This is based on legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). No personally identifiable information is included.
legal.p3_li2: No ads: We do not show any in-app advertising or sponsored content.
legal.p3_li3: No data sales: Data is never sold to third parties or misused for marketing.
legal.p4_desc: Our infrastructure for this landing page is provided by Vercel Inc. When visiting the site, technical connection data (e.g., IP address) is inevitably processed to deliver the page. This is technically necessary and GDPR-compliant (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
legal.p8_desc: Controller within the meaning of the GDPR:
legal.p6_desc: Anonymous session data and gameplay telemetry are retained for 12 months strictly to support the adaptive learning engine, after which they are automatically deleted.
legal.p7_desc: Under the GDPR, you have the right to request access, correction, deletion, and restriction of processing regarding your data. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (e.g., Berliner Beauftragte für Datenschutz). For schools, we process data strictly under Article 28 GDPR. A standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available upon request.

mockups.matrix_desc: Your multiplication tables at a glance.
